desc.cn: <@gd.key>物品准入口</>可限制传送带上允许通过的物品。可通过<@gd.key>物品准入口</>限制通过物品的数量，并在蓝图中标记此段传送带运送的物品。
desc.en: <@gd.key>Item Control Ports</> limit the type and quantity of items allowed to pass through transport belts. Use <@gd.key>Item Control Ports</> in blueprints to mark the type of items to be moved onto various transport belt sections.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>物流桥</>可以使得两条相交的传送带各自独立地运输物品而互不影响。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Belt Bridge</> allows a transport belt to go over another without disrupting the flow of items on both belts.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>汇流器</>可以将多条传送带上的物品合并到一条传送带上，最多可支持三条传送带汇流。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Converger</> can converge product flows of 3 transport belts into a single belt.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>管道准入口</>可限制管道上允许通过的物质。可通过<@gd.key>管道准入口</>限制通过物质的流量，并在蓝图中标记此段管道运送的物质。
desc.en: <@gd.key>Pipe Control Ports</> can limit the fluid and the quantity of fluids allowed to pass through pipelines. Use <@gd.key>Pipe Control Ports</> in blueprints to mark the type of fluid to be moved through various pipelines.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>管道桥</>可以使得两条相交的管道各自独立得运输液体而互不影响。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Pipe Bridge</> allows a pipeline to go over another without disrupting the flow of fluids in both pipelines.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>管道汇流器</>可以使得多条管道上的液体汇流到单一管道上，最多支持三条管道汇流。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Pipe Converger</> can converge up to 3 pipelines into a single pipeline.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>管道分流器</>可将单一管道<@gd.key>分流出最多三条管道</>进行传输。
desc.en: <@gd.key>Pipe Splitters</> can <@gd.key>split 1 pipeline into 2 or 3 pipelines</> to divide fluid flow.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>分流器</>可以将一条传送带上的物品平均分拣到多条传送带上，最多可支持分流成三条传送带。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Splitter</> can split the product flow of 1 transport belt to up to 3 transport belts.

desc.cn: 攻击力：<@ba.key>981 攻击间隔：<@ba.key>3秒 攻击范围：<@ba.key>12.5米
攻击力：<@ba.key>5585 攻击间隔：<@ba.key>3秒 攻击范围：<@ba.key>12.5米
攻击力：<@ba.key>5485 攻击间隔：<@ba.key>5秒 攻击范围：<@ba.key>18米
攻击力：<@ba.key>22338 攻击间隔：<@ba.key>8秒 攻击范围：<@ba.key>12.5米
攻击力：<@ba.key>4886 攻击间隔：<@ba.key>3秒 攻击范围：<@ba.key>12.5米
最小治疗间隔：<@ba.key>5秒 治疗范围：<@ba.key>6米
攻击力：<@ba.key>11634 攻击间隔：<@ba.key>5秒 攻击范围：<@ba.key>20米
攻击力：<@ba.key>609 攻击间隔：<@ba.key>2秒 攻击范围：<@ba.key>15米
攻击力：<@ba.key>2136 攻击间隔：<@ba.key>2秒 攻击范围：<@ba.key>15米
<@gd.key>便捷存取站</>直接连接当地的<@gd.key>仓库</>，可用于野外便捷地通过<@gd.key>仓库</>存取物品。
desc.en: <@gd.key>Easy Stashes</> provide direct access to the local <@gd.key>Depot</>. They are convenient for those who need to acquire or store items in the <@gd.key>Depot</> when traveling in the wilderness.

desc.cn:
给水器只能在湖泊或水池附近建造，且给水器的输水口必须<@gd.key>悬于液面上方</>。
给水器<@gd.key>接入电网</>后，可以将液体输出到对应的场景内。
desc.en: Fluid Supply Units can only be placed near a lake or other water bodies. When placed, its fluid outlet must be <@gd.key>above the water body</>. Once <@gd.key>connected to the power grid</>, the Fluid Supply Unit can supply fluids into the target area.

desc.cn: 储液罐可储存管道输入的<@gd.key>单一类型液体</>。
desc.en: A Fluid Tank can store <@gd.key>a single type of fluid</> delivered to it via pipelines.

desc.cn: 将物品通过传送带输入进<@gd.key>仓库存货口</>后，物品就会存放进仓库。
desc.en: Items moved into the <@gd.key>Depot Loader</> via transport belts will be stored in the Depot.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>仓库存取线基段</>和<@gd.key>仓库存取线源桩</>或其他生效的仓库存取线基段相连后，其上可贴靠放置仓库存货口和仓库取货口。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Depot Bus Section</> must be connected to a <@gd.key>Depot Bus Port</> or other active Depot Bus Sections. Once active, Depot Loaders and Depot Unloaders can be attached to the Depot Bus.

desc.cn:
可以在集成核心区域放置<@gd.key>仓库存取线源桩</>。
<@gd.key>仓库存取线基段</>和<@gd.key>仓库存取线源桩</>或其他生效的仓库存取线基段相连后，其上可贴靠放置仓库存货口和仓库取货口。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Depot Bus Port</> can be placed in the Core AIC Area, while the <@gd.key>Depot Bus Section</> must be connected to a <@gd.key>Depot Bus Port</> or other active Depot Bus Sections. Depot Loaders and Depot Unloaders can be attached to an active Depot Bus.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>留言信标</>会留下一些图标和文字内容，记录了他人在这里想传达的信息。
desc.en: <@gd.key>Memo Beacons</> may include icons and messages that other explorers wish to convey about the location.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>供电桩</>只要放置在<@gd.key>协议核心</>的集成核心区域内，就会自动接入电网，为其供电范围内的设备供电。
desc.en: Place <@gd.key>Electric Pylons</> in the Core AIC Area of the <@gd.key>PAC</> to automatically connect them to the grid. Connected Electric Pylons can supply power to facilities within their power supply radius.

desc.cn: 息壤供电桩也是武陵地区特有的设备，在供电桩原有的范围供电与短距离电力传输功能基础上，可<@gd.key>自动连接</>80M内的协议核心与集成核心区域外的<@gd.key>息壤中继器</>、30M内集成核心区域外的<@gd.key>息壤供电桩</>与其他电力设备。
desc.en: The Xiranite Pylon is a special facility of Wuling. Like an improved Electric Pylon, it can supply power to nearby facilities and provide short-range power transmission. The Xiranite Pylon <@gd.key>automatically connects</> to the Protocol Automation-Core (PAC) and any <@gd.key>Xiranite Relays</> outside the Core AIC Area within an 80-meter radius, and to other <@gd.key>Xiranite Pylons</> and power facilities outside the Core AIC Area within a 30-meter radius.

desc.cn:
<@gd.key>中继器</>是运输电力的重要连接设备。
电力可通过中继器运输至其他的中继器、供电桩以及供电终端，使其接入电网。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Relay Tower</> is a key power transmission facility. Relay Towers can be used to transmit power to other Relay Towers, Electric Pylons, and Electric Nexuses to connect them to the power grid.

desc.cn: 息壤中继器是武陵地区特有的设备，在中继器原有的电力传输和小范围供电的功能基础上，可<@gd.key>自动连接</>80M内的协议核心与集成核心区域外的<@gd.key>息壤电力设备</>。
desc.en: The Xiranite Relay is a special facility of Wuling. Like an improved Relay Tower, it can supply power to nearby facilities and provide power transmission. The Xiranite Relay <@gd.key>automatically connects</> to the Protocol Automation-Core (PAC) and any <@gd.key>Xiranite power facilities</> outside the Core AIC Area within an 80-meter radius.

desc.cn: 浇水、成长、收获<@gd.key>酮化灌木</>。
desc.en: Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Aketine</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Jincao</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Yazhen</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Buckflower</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Citrome</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Sandleaf</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Reed Rye</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Tartpepper</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Redjade Ginseng</>.
Water and grow this plot to harvest <@gd.key>Amber Rice</>.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>洒水机</>在接入水源后可为需要浇灌的目标进行液体喷洒。
desc.en: Connect the <@gd.key>Sprinkler</> to a source of water to sprinkle water on the target.

desc.cn: <@gd.key>协议储存箱</>可存放物品，并在通电后可以将储存物品以一定间隔传输回仓库。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Protocol Stash</> can store items. When powered, the Protocol Stash can also deliver stored items to the Depot on a regular basis.

desc.cn:
<@gd.key>滑索架</>用于在两地之间快速移动，靠近即可使用。
可以选定其他滑索架作为目标，快速前往该处地点。
desc.en: Set up zipline routes with <@gd.key>Zipline Pylons</> to quickly zip from one Pylon to another. Other Zipline Pylons can be selected as destinations to quickly zip to it.

desc.cn:
<@gd.key>长距滑索架</>是一种改良后的滑索架。
长距滑索架不仅可以增加传输距离，而且可支持一次性通过多个<@gd.key>长距滑索架</>。
desc.en: The <@gd.key>Zipline Tower</> is an improved version of the Zipline Pylon. It has a longer zipline range and allows the creation of zipline routes that pass through multiple <@gd.key>Zipline Towers</> in a single trip.

desc.cn: 使用暗管，可将液体自动从<@gd.key>暗管入口</>输送到对应的<@gd.key>暗管出口</>，能够更方便的进行远距离的液体输送。
desc.en: Underground pipes such as conduits can transport fluids from a <@gd.key>Conduit Inlet</> to a corresponding <@gd.key>Conduit Outlet</> to facilitate long-distance fluid transportation.

desc.cn: 使用暗管，可将液体自动从<@gd.key>暗管入口</>输送到对应的<@gd.key>暗管出口</>，能够更方便的进行远距离的液体输送。
desc.en: Underground pipes such as conduits can transport fluids from a <@gd.key>Conduit Inlet</> to a corresponding <@gd.key>Conduit Outlet</> to facilitate long-distance fluid transportation.

desc.cn: 可使用<@gd.key>仓库取货口</>选择仓库中的物品，连接传送带后，就会从仓库中自动输出。
desc.en: Use the <@gd.key>Depot Unloader</> to automatically unload items from the Depot onto the connected transport belt.

desc.cn: 不同区域的装备模板箱
武陵动态侵蚀 - 小规模
desc.en: Active Blight in Wuling: Smaller Masses

desc.cn: 使用扫描解析动态侵蚀
协议核心存电耗尽的应对方式
帝江号 - 干员联络台
帝江号 - 干员进驻与状态变化
帝江号 - 干员信赖度
